entities.name: Modal

entities.name: AX
entities.how_described: 本集说是继开发者体验（DX）之后的重点：Modal 把 SDK 团队的目标从优化 DX 转向优化 AX，强调让智能体能无摩擦地通过修改装饰器获得自我配置的运行时，并在 CLI 和仪表盘中提供可观测性。

evidence.quote: And we think that the same benefits that apply for DX also actually apply for AX,
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

entities.name: DX
entities.how_described: 本集把它描述为早期 Modal 的主打牌：解决传统工作流编排工具难用的问题，让开发者不用写复杂的 YAML，而是通过在代码里加装饰器来定义基础设施需求。

evidence.quote: like a dx layer that was uh really important because we
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: And we think that the same benefits that apply for DX also actually apply for AX,
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

entities.name: 沙箱 (sandbox)
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成是跑不受信代码或隔离工作负载的容器环境。既支持瞬间扩缩容（如做 RL 时瞬间启动十万个沙箱），也升级成了类似 Pod 的结构，支持多容器和 Sidecar 模式。

evidence.quote: And right now it basically covers inference, training, batch crossing and sandbox workloads.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: a gpu sandbox we can throw it on there they'll take a hugging face link

entities.name: 弹性推理 (elastic inference)
entities.how_described: 本集明确指出这是 Modal 目前最大的用例：根据流量自动伸缩算力，能在短时间内（比如从 1000 扩展到 1500 个 GPU）应对不可预测的突发流量。

evidence.quote: Our biggest use case actually is elastic inference.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

entities.name: 投机解码 (speculative decoding)
entities.how_described: 本集说是让小模型（草稿模型）先猜几个词，再让大模型来验证的加速手段。嘉宾强调，相比于死磕底层内核只能提升几个百分点，优化投机解码的「接受长度」能带来 2 到 4 倍的乘法级提升，且零质量损耗。

evidence.quote: how effective speculative decoding really just gets to anything you want
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_00

evidence.quote: to describe what speculative decoding is yes i think so we've covered like ego
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: but it was like two years ago i think it doesn't hurt right the speculative decoding
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

entities.name: DeFlash
entities.how_described: 本集说是 Modal 开源的一个基于块的推测解码器：与传统一次猜一个词不同，它让草稿模型一次预测一整个块，从而大幅加速推理。

evidence.quote: of recently we shared our work on dflash which is a block based speculator
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: by using open source dflash you can get the same performance as you would with one
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: And so we've been working a bunch on dflash, which is a block based speculator.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: like the dflash stuff already baked in, and there's full transparency.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

entities.name: Auto Endpoints
entities.how_described: 本集说是 Modal 推出的服务，让用户无需改代码、通过 UI 就能创建一个集成了所有优化（如 DeFlash）的推理端点，且保留代码透明度，想深度微调随时可以「弹出」黑盒拿回控制权。

evidence.quote: auto endpoints is we want to make frontier level performance available to everyone
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: to explain what auto endpoints are yeah i love you
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_00

entities.name: Kubernetes
entities.how_described: 本集把它作为反面对照：说它是为缓慢扩展的 Web 服务器设计的，难以适应 AI 时代频繁突发的算力需求，且配置文件（YAML）庞大复杂，对人类和智能体都不友好。

evidence.quote: It's because you have to run them on Kubernetes.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: Kubernetes is hard to manage.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: to burst up and down a lot versus like Kubernetes design for like slow scaling
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: which is why would you have an agent read through hundreds of Kubernetes files
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: So there is still a role for the always on large scale Kubernetes type of things.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

entities.name: 装饰器 (decorator)
entities.how_described: 本集说是 Modal 核心的 DSL（领域特定语言）层语法：开发者只需在代码上加上装饰器，就能定义硬件需求和扩展方式，把基础设施需求与业务代码完美协同部署，特别适合智能体理解。

evidence.quote: in a decorator and it gets this sort of self-provisioning runtime of being able
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: other feature which is you can add a decorator to a function and you get a cluster
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

entities.name: Anthropic
entities.how_described: 本集提到它作为大模型厂商之一，推出了自家的「托管智能体」，被主持人拿来质问会不会侵入 Modal 的地盘。

evidence.quote: we're very excited to partner with Anthropic and some of the other foundation labs
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

entities.name: OpenAI
entities.how_described: 本集提到它作为大模型厂商之一，推出了自家的「托管智能体」，与 Anthropic 一起被视作潜在的竞争或合作方。

evidence.quote: Brett Taylor, who's chairman of OpenAI, I was like, we need a new language for LLM.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

entities.name: Suno
entities.how_described: 本集说是 Modal 的客户之一，一家音频公司，有完全自定义的模型架构，需要代码级的控制，在 Modal 上跑所有的推理。

evidence.quote: So we kind of stayed away from the LM space and we were serving companies like Suno
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: A better example is like let's say Suno because Suno does not use modal for training
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

entities.name: Runway
entities.how_described: 本集说是 Modal 的客户之一，一家视频公司，流量波动极大，依赖 Modal 进行部署和自动扩展。

evidence.quote: for audio, Runway for video.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

entities.name: vLLM
entities.how_described: 本集在对比推理引擎性能时提及，被列为现成的开源推理引擎之一（另一个是 SGLang），用来和 Modal 的方案做对比。

evidence.quote: the shelf inference engine vllm sc lang you know get compute

entities.name: SGLang
entities.how_described: 本集在对比推理性能时提及，被列为现成的开源推理引擎之一，并提到 Modal 团队会与 SGLang 团队密切合作并将改进开源上游。

evidence.quote: We work closely with the SGLang team.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

entities.name: Gitpod
entities.how_described: 本集把它（改名 Ona）归为 CICD（持续集成/持续部署）领域的玩家，强调它和 Modal 一样本质上都是做沙箱，只不过一个是构建时沙箱、一个是运行时沙箱。

evidence.quote: Gitpod, somewhat different market.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

evidence.quote: Yeah, people on our team have talked to the Gitpod team and they're technically very strong.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_02

evidence.quote: yeah so so uh for those who don't know gitpod rebranded
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_01

entities.name: Cognition
entities.how_described: 本集作为 Modal 的重点客户提及，使用 Modal 来运行智能体工作负载，且有工程师直接驻点在 Cognition 进行配合。

entities.name: CI/CD
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成是智能体时代的一个潜在爆发点：随着编码智能体运行大量 CI 任务，可以用内存快照等原语来跳过依赖准备阶段，大幅减少 CI 浪费的时间。

entities.name: RDMA
entities.how_described: 本集说它是为了在节点之间更快地传输数据而绕过 TCP 网络的方式，对于多节点训练是必需的，Modal 内部网络支持每秒 3 万亿比特的传输标准。

entities.name: IPv6
entities.how_described: 本集说 Modal 偶然基于 IPv6 搭建了一个私有 Overlay 网络，原本只是给分布式训练做密钥交换用的，结果被客户自己发现并挪作他用（如跨节点容器通信）。
